# llm-degen-guard
> LLM output degeneration detector — 4-signal composite scoring, zero dep
`pip install llm-degen-guard`
## Features
Streaming + batch detection, n-gram/compression/substring/line-diversity signals, structural content discount, configurable thresholds
## Exports
`from degen_guard import DegenGuard, DegenReport, SignalDetail`
## Quick Use
```python
from degen_guard import DegenGuard
report = DegenGuard.check("some LLM output")  # batch
guard = DegenGuard()                           # streaming
is_degen, score = guard.feed(chunk)
```
## Links
- [Full API](/llms-full.txt) | [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/llm-degen-guard/) | [Source](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/llm-degen-guard)
